Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, multiple-monitor support

memory.slots: 2 sockets available for two JEDEC 144 pin SDRAM SO-DIMMs
memory.features: 32MB or 64MB standard; sockets accessed by removing screw on bottom

display_options: 14.1" TFT XGA 1024x768, 16 million simultaneous colors, Active Matrix TFT, 150 nits (AC) / 90 nits (batt), 100:1 contrast, 180 degree tilt

storage.hdd: 5.1GB or 8.1GB, EIDE, removable, S.M.A.R.T., supports two internal disks (16.2GB max)
storage.optical: Standard or optional: 24X-10X CD-ROM, bootable, hot swap, EIDE (ATAPI); Standard or optional: DVD drive (8x-16x speed, requires DVD and Enhanced Video Adapter for movie playback)

Battery.capacity: 3.5 hrs (7 hrs with second battery in UltraBay II)

ports: 2 x PC Card slots (Type I/II/III, CardBus, PCMCIA 2.1, Zoomed Video)
1 x Video in/out (Composite and S-Video, standard on 5AU, optional on others)
1 x Dolby Digital AC-3 connector (with optional DVD and Enhanced Video Adapter)
Infrared ports (front and back) with IrDA 1.1, up to 4Mbps
audio: 16-bit audio chip, SRS 3D audio, FM synthesis (CS4237B)
Software decodes AC3 into stereo, MPEG-2 audio decoding via software
Internal stereo speakers (front, 1W), rotary volume control (right), internal microphone
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard, flat (does not lift up), rear legs pop up (5.5 degrees slope)
TrackPoint with Press-to-Select, Release-to-Select, center click button for scrolling/magnifying glass

physical.weight: 7.6 lbs (3.45 kg) with battery/diskette (5AU: 7.8 lbs/3.5 kg)

security: Phillips-head screws on base for battery and UltraBay II bays
system: Windows NT 4.0 Workstation (FAT16) with Service Pack 3
